mapper.select: SELECT p_no, p_title, p_content, p_level, p_time, p_date FROM problem ORDER BY p_no ASC
SELECT p_no, p_title, p_content, p_level, p_time, p_date FROM problem WHERE p_no = #{p_no}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO problem ( p_no, p_title, p_content, p_level, p_time, p_date ) VALUES ( PROBLEM_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{p_title}, #{p_content}, #{p_level}, #{p_time}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE problem SET p_title = #{p_title}, p_content = #{p_content}, p_level = #{p_level}, p_time = #{p_time} WHERE p_no = #{p_no}
